TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Peru u Peru sa i labu nu Congnanmeico, itiza i 10 00 S, 76 00 W. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 1,285,216 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1,279,996 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 5,220 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 30,741,062. kakalukan umah sa 18.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 53%, zumaay henay umah sa 28.20%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Lima. kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 28 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, micakat a demiad sa i 2016 a mihca 7 bulad 28 demia . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan. lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ Mi-lu Áßėť≠Į lalangawan Áßėť≠ĮśĖáŚĆĖ Mi-lu u sakasingangan tu kitakidan a Ku-in-cia nu palekalan tu lalangawan, u lalangawan nu kawawan u Mi-lu kanatal ku sisikiningay tu lalangawan. tu sep cay sep mihcaan pic bulad cay sip demiad, Kuo-huy nu Mi-lu mihang patideng tu lalangawan nu kakitidaan, mikawaw tu kanatal nu Pu-w'-kun, laziw tilibi nu kakawawan atu lalangawan nu kanatal tu sapikinkiwan nu kakulian. 2010ŚĻī7śúą14śó•, . sayaway nu Mi-lu sakakaay, u sakasinganganay tu zen-lei-sye-cia atu li-se-sye-cia ci Hu-an. Ma-tin. Aw-si-aw itida i siw bulad sip demiad mihapu malingatu patideng. . lalangawan nu Mi-lu namaka In-ti-an atu Si-pan-ya nu laylayen, nika hiyaen nu Huy-cuo, Ye-cuo atu O-cuo mapalalid nu binacadan. u nalimaan nu Mi-lu taneng talaayawen ku nipikilim nu ayawan a nalimaan, kabing, keliwkeliwan nu dikuc, kalin atu nikihulan tu sulit. . mahida tu ku nipikawaw nu In-cia a tademaw, sakay pisalumaan maseneng ku nuheni, pasu Ma-cin-pi-ciw sumamaday a nipisangaan tu luma'. Pa-luo-ke nalimaan han u mabulaway nu zitayan ku angangan tu nalimaan, nika idaw ku mapalaiday nu itidaay a laylayan. tawya u kiwkay nu kawaw ku angangan nu sapikulitaw, tawya yadah ku nipatideng tu kiwkay atu Ku-se-ke mikulitay nu tawyaay a dayhiwan. . misiteked satu ku Mi-lu hida satu caay ka lahat, katukuh tu tu sep nu secian tu lingatu In-ti-an cu-yi yun-tung a mapalekal. . namaka cay siw lim sep mihcaan, u nalimaan nu Mi-lu caay tu kayadah, mapahiya nu nutaw a kanatal atu tidaay nu lalalidan a nikasabalubaluhayan. . u wen-sye nu Mi-lu tu angangangan namaka Ke-lun-pu zitay nu nakamuan a laylayan. . Si-pan-ya namaka cay nem secian pacumud tu sulit, tu malimaday nu zitayan ina wen-sye ti idaw ku likisi atu kiwkay nu cudadan. . misiteked satu, pisalisinan atu lang-man-cu-yi malaangangngan a wen-sye liw-pay, misulitay tina cudadan ci Li-ka-tuo. Pa'-e-ma. Áć®ÁęčŚĺĆ, . tu sep seci tu lingatu In-ti-an cuyi yentun mapalekal kina Si-luo. A-lay-ke-li-ya, He-say. Ma-li-ya. A-ke-ta-se, atu Say-sa-e. Pa-lei-hu sitangahay nu matinengay misulit a tademaw. teban nu tu sep seci itida i La-tin-mei-cuo mabakuhac nu maladayhiway nu tademaw ci Ma-li-aw. Pa-e-cia-se. Le-sa malaliday nu tademawan, u wen-sye nu Mi-lu yadah tu ku matinengay. lami' nu Mi-lu malalamel tu In-ti-an atu Si-pan-ya, kanamuhan nu Huy-cu, A-la-puo, Yi-ta-li, Cung-kuo atu Dipun nu nipisalamian nu kangadahan. . picidekan sa aru Cung-kuo Kaun-tun liwlian atu niyaduay nu liwlian malalamel tu tidaay nu sakasenengan a Chifa, itida i Suo-tu Li-ma-se, nu cacayay nu maci a dadanan kanca idaw ku " Chifa" a kangpangan. Chifa "Chifa"ÁöĄśčõÁČĆ. sakasinganganan a Chifa han namaka Cung-kuo nakamuan kan sananay a yimian, aminca inalami malaliwli nu Cung-kuo, nika ina Cung-kuo kakanan mamin i niyaniyaduan i Mi-lu, ina liwli hantu itawya tu malaMi-lu u picidekan nu kan, caay tu kaw tawyaay a Cung-kuo lamian, duma nu Mi-lu nu lamian pasu" anticuchos","ceviche","humita" atu"pachamanca". chifa "anticuchos","ceviche","humita"ŚíĆ"pachamanca". kapah nu demiad nu Mi-lu picidekan nu itidaay nu caayay kalecal nu kilakilangan atu aadupan u kakanen namin. ayda hantu, u lalamian nu Mi-lu tu sapalamel yadah ku sapalamelan tu zayliwan tadakapah tu sisa yadah ku masahicahicaay nu nisalamian. . In-ti-an , Si-pan-ya , Fei-cuo a laylay. yu makatukuh ku Si-pan-ya tademaw, caayay kalecad nu sasinzaan caay kalecad ku dadadiwan, yu mipiyu tu lapa nu dadatukan " quena" atu tatuktukan nu dadatukan " tinya" hinaadih kita. "quena"ŚíĆśē≤śďäś®āŚô®"tinya"ťÉĹśĮĒŤľÉŚłłŤ¶č. Si-pan-ya tademaw idaw ku nisabaluhay tu dadatukan atu gita atu su-cin anipataynian, nikuda idaw aca ku nipalekalan tu laylay nu dadatukan atu baluhay nu dadatukan a malamelay nu " charango". laylay nu Fei-cuo misuayaw tu Mi-lu nu dadatukan a nipainian pasuwenpu atu tatuktukan nu dadatukan "caj√≥n" a nipacumudan. laylay nu Mi-lu nu palawan idaw "marinera","tondero","danza de tijeras" atu "huayno". Peru (Mi-Lu Áßėť≠Į) a laylay nu palaw han idaw ku "marinera","tondero","danza de tijeras"atu"huayno". sangaw ya Cwo-in-sangaw mapasilac i Lein-he-kuo cudadan nu masakaputay nu tademaw caay kaw tuud nu lalangawan nu dayday tu sakasinganganan.

ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa *,*** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa **,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **.**%. tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u r~…ĺima. kakininan nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad kakiniŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad sa ** bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) ajza sa ¶i p…ôdro pabr~…ĺo ku ¶zjnski, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômia . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan. r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ** mi-r~…ĺu ** r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan **** mi-r~…ĺu u sakasiŇčaŇčan tu kitakidan a ku-in- ¶ia nu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu kawawan u mi-r~…ĺu kanatar~…ĺ ku sisikiniŇčaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. tu s…ôp ¶aj s…ôp mińß ¶aan pi ¶ bur~…ĺad ¶aj sip d…ômiad, kuo-ńßuj nu mi-r~…ĺu mińßaŇč patid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu kakitidaan, mikawaw tu kanatar~…ĺ nu pu-w Ē~ °-kun, r~…ĺaziw tir~…ĺibi nu kakawawan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu kanatar~…ĺ tu sapikinkiwan nu kakur~…ĺian. **********, . sajawaj nu mi-r~…ĺu sakakaaj, u sakasiŇčaŇčanaj tu z…ôn-r~…ĺ…ôi-sj…ô- ¶ia atu r~…ĺi-s…ô-sj…ô- ¶ia ¶i ńßu-an. ma-tin. aw-si-aw itida i siw bur~…ĺad sip d…ômiad mińßapu mar~…ĺiŇčatu patid…ôŇč. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu mi-r~…ĺu namaka in-ti-an atu si-pan-ja nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj…ôn, nika ńßija…ôn nu ńßuj- ¶uo, j…ô- ¶uo atu o- ¶uo mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu bina ¶adan. u nar~…ĺimaan nu mi-r~…ĺu tan…ôŇč tar~…ĺaajaw…ôn ku nipikir~…ĺim nu ajawan a nar~…ĺimaan, kabiŇč, k…ôr~…ĺiwk…ôr~…ĺiwan nu diku ¶, kar~…ĺin atu nikińßur~…ĺan tu sur~…ĺit. . mańßida tu ku nipikawaw nu in- ¶ia a tad…ômaw, sakaj pisar~…ĺumaan mas…ôn…ôŇč ku nuńß…ôni, pasu ma- ¶in-pi- ¶iw sumamadaj a nipisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. pa-r~…ĺuo-k…ô nar~…ĺimaan ńßan u mabur~…ĺawaj nu zitajan ku aŇčaŇčan tu nar~…ĺimaan, nika idaw ku mapar~…ĺaidaj nu itidaaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺajan. tawja u kiwkaj nu kawaw ku aŇčaŇčan nu sapikur~…ĺitaw, tawja jadańß ku nipatid…ôŇč tu kiwkaj atu ku-s…ô-k…ô mikur~…ĺitaj nu tawjaaj a dajńßiwan. . misit…ôk…ôd satu ku mi-r~…ĺu ńßida satu ¶aaj ka r~…ĺańßat, katukuńß tu tu s…ôp nu s…ô ¶ian tu r~…ĺiŇčatu in-ti-an ¶u-ji jun-tuŇč a mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ. . namaka ¶aj siw r~…ĺim s…ôp mińß ¶aan, u nar~…ĺimaan nu mi-r~…ĺu ¶aaj tu kajadańß, mapańßija nu nutaw a kanatar~…ĺ atu tidaaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺidan a nikasabar~…ĺubar~…ĺuńßajan. . u w…ôn-sj…ô nu mi-r~…ĺu tu aŇčaŇčaŇčan namaka k…ô-r~…ĺun-pu zitaj nu nakamuan a r~…ĺajr~…ĺajan. . si-pan-ja namaka ¶aj n…ôm s…ô ¶ian pa ¶umud tu sur~…ĺit, tu mar~…ĺimadaj nu zitajan ina w…ôn-sj…ô ti idaw ku r~…ĺikisi atu kiwkaj nu ¶udadan. . misit…ôk…ôd satu, pisar~…ĺisinan atu r~…ĺaŇč-man- ¶u-ji mar~…ĺaaŇčaŇčŇčan a w…ôn-sj…ô r~…ĺiw-paj, misur~…ĺitaj tina ¶udadan ¶i r~…ĺi-ka-tuo. pa Ē~ °-…ô-ma. ***, . tu s…ôp s…ô ¶i tu r~…ĺiŇčatu in-ti-an ¶uji j…ôntun mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ kina si-r~…ĺuo. a-r~…ĺaj-k…ô-r~…ĺi-ja, ńß…ô-saj. ma-r~…ĺi-ja. a-k…ô-ta-s…ô, atu saj-sa-…ô. pa-r~…ĺ…ôi-ńßu sitaŇčańßaj nu matin…ôŇčaj misur~…ĺit a tad…ômaw. t…ôban nu tu s…ôp s…ô ¶i itida i r~…ĺa-tin-m…ôi- ¶uo mabakuńßa ¶ nu mar~…ĺadajńßiwaj nu tad…ômaw ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-aw. pa-…ô- ¶ia-s…ô. r~…ĺ…ô-sa mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj nu tad…ômawan, u w…ôn-sj…ô nu mi-r~…ĺu jadańß tu ku matin…ôŇčaj. r~…ĺami Ē~ ° nu mi-r~…ĺu mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu in-ti-an atu si-pan-ja, kanamuńßan nu ńßuj- ¶u, a-r~…ĺa-puo, ¶ńßifa, itida i suo-tu r~…ĺi-ma-s…ô, nu ¶a ¶ajaj nu ma ¶i a dadanan kan ¶a idaw ku " ¶ńßifa" a kaŇčpaŇčan. ¶ńßifa " ¶ńßifa"***. sakasiŇčaŇčanan a ¶ńßifa ńßan namaka ¶uŇč-kuo nakamuan kan sananaj a d…ômiad nu mi-r~…ĺu pi ¶id…ôkan nu itidaaj nu ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan atu aadupan u kakan…ôn namin. ajda ńßantu, u r~…ĺar~…ĺamian nu mi-r~…ĺu tu sapar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ jadańß ku sapar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan tu zajr~…ĺiwan tadakapańß tu sisa jadańß ku masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu nisar~…ĺamian. . in-ti-an , si-pan-ja , f…ôi- ¶uo a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj. ju makatukuńß ku si-pan-ja tad…ômaw, ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sasinzaan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku dadadiwan, ju mipiju tu r~…ĺapa nu dadatukan " *u…ôna" atu tatuktukan nu dadatukan " tinja" ńßinaadińß kita. "*u…ôna"*****"tinja"*****. si-pan-ja tad…ômaw idaw ku nisabar~…ĺuńßaj tu dadatukan atu gita atu su- ¶in anipatajnian, nikuda idaw a ¶a ku nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu dadatukan atu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu dadatukan a mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj nu " ¶ńßaraŇčo". r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu f…ôi- ¶uo misuajaw tu mi-r~…ĺu nu dadatukan a nipainian pasuw…ônpu atu tatuktukan nu dadatukan " ¶aj*n" a nipa ¶umudan. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu mi-r~…ĺu nu par~…ĺawan idaw "marin…ôra","tond…ôro","danza d…ô tij…ôras" atu "ńßuajno". p…ôru (mi-r~…ĺu **) a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu par~…ĺaw ńßan idaw ku "marin…ôra","tond…ôro","danza d…ô tij…ôras"atu"ńßuajno". saŇčaw ja ¶wo-in-saŇčaw mapasir~…ĺa ¶ i r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo ¶udadan nu masakaputaj nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj kaw tuud nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu dajdaj tu sakasiŇčaŇčanan.
S.FORM: Peru u Peru sa i labu nu Congnanmeico, itiza i 10 00 S, 76 00 W. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 1,285,216 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 1,279,996 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 5,220 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 30,741,062. kakalukan umah sa 18.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 53%, zumaay henay umah sa 28.20%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Lima. kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 28 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, micakat a demiad sa i 2016 a mihca 7 bulad 28 demia . malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan. lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ Mi-lu Áßėť≠Į lalangawan Áßėť≠ĮśĖáŚĆĖ Mi-lu u sakasingangan tu kitakidan a Ku-in-cia nu palekalan tu lalangawan, u lalangawan nu kawawan u Mi-lu kanatal ku sisikiningay tu lalangawan. tu sep cay sep mihcaan pic bulad cay sip demiad, Kuo-huy nu Mi-lu mihang patideng tu lalangawan nu kakitidaan, mikawaw tu kanatal nu Pu-w'-kun, laziw tilibi nu kakawawan atu lalangawan nu kanatal tu sapikinkiwan nu kakulian. 2010ŚĻī7śúą14śó•, . sayaway nu Mi-lu sakakaay, u sakasinganganay tu zen-lei-sye-cia atu li-se-sye-cia ci Hu-an. Ma-tin. Aw-si-aw itida i siw bulad sip demiad mihapu malingatu patideng. . lalangawan nu Mi-lu namaka In-ti-an atu Si-pan-ya nu laylayen, nika hiyaen nu Huy-cuo, Ye-cuo atu O-cuo mapalalid nu binacadan. u nalimaan nu Mi-lu taneng talaayawen ku nipikilim nu ayawan a nalimaan, kabing, keliwkeliwan nu dikuc, kalin atu nikihulan tu sulit. . mahida tu ku nipikawaw nu In-cia a tademaw, sakay pisalumaan maseneng ku nuheni, pasu Ma-cin-pi-ciw sumamaday a nipisangaan tu luma'. Pa-luo-ke nalimaan han u mabulaway nu zitayan ku angangan tu nalimaan, nika idaw ku mapalaiday nu itidaay a laylayan. tawya u kiwkay nu kawaw ku angangan nu sapikulitaw, tawya yadah ku nipatideng tu kiwkay atu Ku-se-ke mikulitay nu tawyaay a dayhiwan. . misiteked satu ku Mi-lu hida satu caay ka lahat, katukuh tu tu sep nu secian tu lingatu In-ti-an cu-yi yun-tung a mapalekal. . namaka cay siw lim sep mihcaan, u nalimaan nu Mi-lu caay tu kayadah, mapahiya nu nutaw a kanatal atu tidaay nu lalalidan a nikasabalubaluhayan. . u wen-sye nu Mi-lu tu angangangan namaka Ke-lun-pu zitay nu nakamuan a laylayan. . Si-pan-ya namaka cay nem secian pacumud tu sulit, tu malimaday nu zitayan ina wen-sye ti idaw ku likisi atu kiwkay nu cudadan. . misiteked satu, pisalisinan atu lang-man-cu-yi malaangangngan a wen-sye liw-pay, misulitay tina cudadan ci Li-ka-tuo. Pa'-e-ma. Áć®ÁęčŚĺĆ, . tu sep seci tu lingatu In-ti-an cuyi yentun mapalekal kina Si-luo. A-lay-ke-li-ya, He-say. Ma-li-ya. A-ke-ta-se, atu Say-sa-e. Pa-lei-hu sitangahay nu matinengay misulit a tademaw. teban nu tu sep seci itida i La-tin-mei-cuo mabakuhac nu maladayhiway nu tademaw ci Ma-li-aw. Pa-e-cia-se. Le-sa malaliday nu tademawan, u wen-sye nu Mi-lu yadah tu ku matinengay. lami' nu Mi-lu malalamel tu In-ti-an atu Si-pan-ya, kanamuhan nu Huy-cu, A-la-puo, Yi-ta-li, Cung-kuo atu Dipun nu nipisalamian nu kangadahan. . picidekan sa aru Cung-kuo Kaun-tun liwlian atu niyaduay nu liwlian malalamel tu tidaay nu sakasenengan a Chifa, itida i Suo-tu Li-ma-se, nu cacayay nu maci a dadanan kanca idaw ku " Chifa" a kangpangan. Chifa "Chifa"ÁöĄśčõÁČĆ. sakasinganganan a Chifa han namaka Cung-kuo nakamuan kan sananay a yimian, aminca inalami malaliwli nu Cung-kuo, nika ina Cung-kuo kakanan mamin i niyaniyaduan i Mi-lu, ina liwli hantu itawya tu malaMi-lu u picidekan nu kan, caay tu kaw tawyaay a Cung-kuo lamian, duma nu Mi-lu nu lamian pasu" anticuchos","ceviche","humita" atu"pachamanca". chifa "anticuchos","ceviche","humita"ŚíĆ"pachamanca". kapah nu demiad nu Mi-lu picidekan nu itidaay nu caayay kalecal nu kilakilangan atu aadupan u kakanen namin. ayda hantu, u lalamian nu Mi-lu tu sapalamel yadah ku sapalamelan tu zayliwan tadakapah tu sisa yadah ku masahicahicaay nu nisalamian. . In-ti-an , Si-pan-ya , Fei-cuo a laylay. yu makatukuh ku Si-pan-ya tademaw, caayay kalecad nu sasinzaan caay kalecad ku dadadiwan, yu mipiyu tu lapa nu dadatukan " quena" atu tatuktukan nu dadatukan " tinya" hinaadih kita. "quena"ŚíĆśē≤śďäś®āŚô®"tinya"ťÉĹśĮĒŤľÉŚłłŤ¶č. Si-pan-ya tademaw idaw ku nisabaluhay tu dadatukan atu gita atu su-cin anipataynian, nikuda idaw aca ku nipalekalan tu laylay nu dadatukan atu baluhay nu dadatukan a malamelay nu " charango". laylay nu Fei-cuo misuayaw tu Mi-lu nu dadatukan a nipainian pasuwenpu atu tatuktukan nu dadatukan "caj√≥n" a nipacumudan. laylay nu Mi-lu nu palawan idaw "marinera","tondero","danza de tijeras" atu "huayno". Peru (Mi-Lu Áßėť≠Į) a laylay nu palaw han idaw ku "marinera","tondero","danza de tijeras"atu"huayno". sangaw ya Cwo-in-sangaw mapasilac i Lein-he-kuo cudadan nu masakaputay nu tademaw caay kaw tuud nu lalangawan nu dayday tu sakasinganganan.
